options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <partitionName {list}> # Specifies list of partition names

options.name: -alignFeedThruPinsOptWithMasterClone
options.description: Place pins such that the pins are aligned on different partitions across buffers on master/clone.

options.name: -autoBusGroup
options.description: Specifies for automatic grouping of bus.

options.name: -basedOnMasterOnly
options.description: Consider only master partition

options.name: -blackbox
options.description: Assign pins of blackbox.

options.name: -debugPinAll
options.description: Specify debugging for all pins

options.name: -debugPinFile
options.description: Specify pin-list for partition or net in a file for debugging

options.name: -dumpVirtualPinGuide
options.description: Write virtual pinGuide for netGroup and pinGroup in <topCell>_virtualPinGuide.tcl file.

options.name: -enforceFlyline
options.description: Follow fly-lines and ignores pin constraints

options.name: -enforceRoute
options.description: Follow routing cross-point and ignores pin constraints

options.name: -enforceRouteLegal
options.description: Try to place pins close to routing cross point but at legal location. Call earlyGlobalRoute internally to re-routes nets not placed at initial routing cross point.

options.name: -exclude_pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list to be excluded for partition in a file

options.name: -exclude_ptn
options.description: Specifies the list of exluded partition for pin-file

options.name: -ignoreAbuttedCheck
options.description: For faster pin assignment on abutted design, ignore abutted check.

options.name: -ignore_group_pins
options.description: Partial non #optimizeOrder#opt_order# pinGroup or netGroup pins ignored during selected pin assignment.

options.name: -improvePinOrder
options.description: Reduces flight line crossing

options.name: -improveSI
options.description: Place pins as checkerboard on Mx+2 and Mx-2 layers to reduce signal-integrity problems down the flow.

options.name: -layerPriority
options.description: Specifies the metal layer(s) should be used with priority.

options.name: -markFixed
options.description: Assigned pins have a Fixed status

options.name: -moveFixedPin
options.description: Assign specified pin with a Fixed status

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies list of pins, option can be repeated

options.name: -pin_file
options.description: Specify pin-list for partition in a file

options.name: -printPinMovementStatistics
options.description: Prints a summary of the deviation

options.name: -ptn
options.description: Specifies name of the partition, option can be repeated

options.name: -skipAutoBusBitOrder
options.description: Skip automatic order of bus bits.

options.name: -skipPlaceExternalUnconnectedPin
options.description: Skip placing pins which are not connected at top level.

options.name: -unplacedOnly
options.description: Assign only unplaced pins.
